title: Auto Trash
description: Allows the player to put items in a menu. If the item that was put in the menu and picked up again, it will be deleted.
body:
# Auto Trash

**Auto Trash** is a client & server-side mod for Minecraft that lets you mark items as trash so they’re automatically deleted when they enter your inventory — perfect for mining, farming, and general cleanup.

> Please visit my [GitHub page](https://github.com/Tobber56/Floonks-Mods) to see my other mods and for sending bug reports, suggestions, and questions.

---

## Features

### 🗑️ Auto-delete junk
Mark any item as trash and have it instantly removed the next time it enters your inventory.

### 📦 Simple trash panel
Use a clean trash panel alongside your inventory to add or remove items from the trash list.

### 🧹 Keep your inventory clean
Great for mining sessions, mob farms, or modded playthroughs where your inventory fills up with junk.

---

## Notes

- Works on both **client and server**  
- Supports **Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge**
